news.title:
HCL Tech aims 3x growth in IBM software portfolio and 2-4% revenue rise in FY26.
The company is also restructuring parts of its operations for this target.

news.title:
HCLTech restructures its software arm, HCLSoftware, into three sub-groups: Xperience, Data, and Operations, aiming for growth in the AI era.
The company acquired Jaspersoft and Wobby for $245.3M and plans to triple software business growth by FY27.
news.summary:
HCLTech restructures its software arm, HCLSoftware, into three sub-groups: Xperience, Data, and Operations, aiming for growth in the AI era.
The company acquired Jaspersoft and Wobby for $245.3M and plans to triple software business growth by FY27.

news.title:
UBS sees Infosys, HCLTech, and Persistent as top IT picks amid sector de-rating, citing better risk-reward profiles.
UBS downgraded Mphasis, upgraded Tech Mahindra, and initiated Neutral on Coforge while highlighting AI-driven challenges in IT.

news.title:
HCL Technologies reports release of guarantee on USD notes by HCL America.
HCL America repaid USD 252.2M notes; no outstanding notes remain as of now.
news.summary:
HCL Technologies reports release of guarantee on USD notes by HCL America.
HCL America repaid USD 252.2M notes; no outstanding notes remain as of now.

news.title:
HCL Technologies issued $500M senior notes in March 2021 and bought back $247.8M in Feb 2023.
The remaining $252.2M will be repaid by March 2026, releasing the company's guarantee on notes.
news.summary:
HCL Technologies issued $500M senior notes in March 2021 and bought back $247.8M in Feb 2023.
The remaining $252.2M will be repaid by March 2026, releasing the company's guarantee on notes.

news.title:
TCS, Infosys, and Wipro saw market cap declines of 36%, 29%, and 42% respectively since 2021.
Tech Mahindra (+14%) and HCL Tech (+18%) improved market cap due to AI focus and diversified portfolios.
